title: Chapter 11
content:
Chapter 11: Village Square

As soon as they heard the knock both Denzel and Sophia jolted up and instinctively knew what to do.

Sophia immediately got herself dressed up and lay on the bed and pretended to fall asleep while Denzel just pulled his trousers and was the one to go answer the door

Turn

He turned the door knob and opened the door for the person that was knocking.

’It was mum after all. I mean who else could it be, its just the three of us living in this building.’

’But what brought her here this late’

Before Denzel could speak, Maria beat him to it.

"Um...Denzel...how do I say this" She stuttered while looking a bit shy

’Huh...what is so serious that’s hard for her to speak out’

"I just saw a rat now in my room too. It was on top of my bed laying with me as I opened my eyes"

"It seems our home is now infested by rats, we’ll have to do something about it"

"Is that so? Its becoming quite serious we have to work on it quickly"

"But before that, can I...also sleep in your room this night. I’m scared it might jump on me while I’m asleep"

’Huh? What the hell is going on in this house. Today of all days two rats decided to pop out of nowhere. Two! Just one was enough, curse the second one’

’I can’t make my move while the both of them are around. I guess I’ll have to plan for another day’

"It’s no problem, Mum. You can come and sleep here too, there is enough room"

"Oh, thank you Denzel"

Maria came into Denzel’s room with her pillow already in hand. Sophia stayed in the middle while Denzel lay right behind her and Maria on the other side

’What a night this would’ve been’

He looked at Sophia’s round ass that was pointing right at his hard cock

’I would have fucked this filthy fat ass slut tonight. Curses. I’ll get another chance no need to ponder on tonight. Time to get some sleep’

**

The next morning

Denzel woke up and the bright light of the sun shone into his eyes which he covered with his hands on reflex

He stood up from his bed and looked around him...everybody that slept in his room was already gone

’Did I sleep that much that everyone already left? And why didn’t they even bother to wake me up’

’Well, I can’t blame them old Denzel really had a reputation’

Denzel stood up and searched the entire house to completely be certain that no one was around, but nobody was home and it was just him alone.

It was a working day so everybody was expected to leave the house for work except Denzel of course, or at least the old Denzel.

’Since no one is around I better go looking for the job I talked about yesterday. A well paying one that can feed the family to good meals’

That was when the system popped up again right in front of him

[Allocate Taboo Points Earned!]

[Allocate Taboo Points Earned!]

This type of impromptu notification didn’t catch Denzel off guard anymore as he was already used to it

’That reminds me of the Special Quest yesterday, it was supposed to give me 30 points if I remember correctly. Let’s see what that was about’

Subconsciously he opened up his status bar

[Name: Denzel Ridrat]

[Age: 22 years]

[Strength: 10]

[Agility: 10]

[Sense: 10]

[Vitality: 10]

[Stamina: 10]

[Mana: 10/10]

[Rank: E]

[Harem: 0]

[Taboo points: 40]

[Taboo Points can be allocated to stats]

’40 Points? Shouldn’t it be just 30 for completing the special quest’

[10 Points were allocated for the blowjob from target Sophia]

’I see, so I can assume a normal sex act like that gets me 10 points. I’ll confirm that later, let me get to allocating my stats’

He looked at the stats wondering which stats he was going to distribute his points to

’Well two things come in mind first, strength and stamina. It would make me last longer in bed and able to move my bitch however I want. But asides that, it would help in my normal day to day life and since I’m also looking for a job it would prove helpful to have strength and able to last longer with enough stamina’

He made his decision there and allocated 20 points each to strength and stamina

His stats window changed taking effect the changes that was just made.

[Name: Denzel Ridrat]

[Age: 22 years]

[Strength: 30]

[Agility: 10]

[Sense: 10]

[Vitality: 10]

[Stamina: 30]

[Mana: 10/10]

[Rank: E]

[Harem: 0]

[Taboo points: 0]

’I should start heading out to look for that job before all of them is taken from me’

He got dressed quickly and left the house, locked the door and kept the key under the rug in case anyone comes back before him.

’How do I go about getting a job now. I don’t have too much memories about that...I’ll just walk around the village now and see what I can find’

Denzel clearly remembered where the village square was located and decided to just move in that direction and keep an eye out for anything that intrigues him.

After walking for a couple minutes and admiring the beautiful scenery of the village, he finally arrived at the village square. Surprisingly to him, it was looking was more like a market square...people selling in their shops and other people buying from them.

’Wow, it’s busier than I anticipated. That’s an advantage because if there are this many shops it’ll be easier to find a job if I just ask from shop to shop’ so he thought

Denzel went around asking just like he planned and looking for employment but every single shop denied him of employment. The problem now was it was not because he wasn’t fit for the job, it was because of old Denzel’s bad reputation. He has been employed in this square multiple times and end up quiting within a few days. This made them blacklist him from employment in the square...

’And now I’m suffering the consequences of his actions!’ Denzel knelt down, what to do unknown to him

’Fucking Denzel! Not only do you live your women to do all the work you also mess up my chance to make things right and be a real man of the house! Curse you bruh!’ Denzel thought

As he was cursing old Denzel, an elderly man approached him and tapped him on his back

"I heard you were looking for a job" the man said

Denzel turned around upon hearing the Word ’Job’

"Yes, I am. How can you help me, you want to offer me one" Denzel replied

"Not really, but I have an opportunity for you"

"Oh yeah? I’m all ears then" Denzel replied waiting to hear what the man has to offe

"There has been a job put up for physical labour in the village chiefs house, and you looked quite strong I bet you can handle it. It pays 10 gold coins per week" the man said

"10 gold coins!?" Denzel replied in shock

’That’s enough money to feed well for an entire month, though not luxurious food but good enough food, and for just engaging in physical labour?...’ Denzel thoughts shocked

"Count me in" Denzel replied

"Alright then, follow me" the man replied
